# Claude Widgets Viewer

> A free, local-first application to render, view, and manage Claude AI HTML/React widgets, visuals, and artifacts exactly as they appear inside the official Claude chat interface.

## What it does
- Extracts and visualizes HTML/JS widgets/artifacts generated by Claude AI.
- Simulates the exact DOM and CSS environment of the Claude UI so widgets don't break.
- Stores widgets locally in the browser using IndexedDB.
- Never uploads any user code or widgets to a server.
- Allows instant searching, deleting, and clearing of stored widgets.

## Features
- Pixel-perfect rendering matching Claude's dark mode environment.
- Persistent local storage: files survive page reloads and browser restarts.
- Responsive layout with sidebar toggles and dynamic iframe widths.
- Global search (Cmd/Ctrl + K) overlay.
- Drag and drop interface for uploading saved `.html` artifacts.

## Pages
- Main viewer: /

## Technical details
- Fully client-side application built with Vanilla JS and CSS.
- IndexedDB for large blob storage (bypassing localStorage limits).
- Uses `srcdoc` iframes for rendering isolation.
- CSS variables mirroring Claude's token system.

## URL
https://bratuka.dev/claude-widgets-viewer/

## Source
https://github.com/BrAtUkA/claude-widgets-viewer
